save_your_wins_losses_and_standings_in_t: Save your wins, losses, and standings in the cloud.
shuffled_in_3d: The cards are created and shuffled in 3D, so there's no cheating.
tilt_your_phone: Watch the cards fly by tilting your phone.
hd_quality: The cards are in HD quality. Play it on a tablet, it looks fantastic!
only_valid_plays: Only valid plays are allowed. You decide the moves, no suggestions
features_headline: Now you can play online with friends in private mode or with a random player
features_color_desc: Green, Blue, or Red — your choice
tutorial_heading: Do you know how to play?
tutorial_subheading: Watch this 3.5 minute video and you'll see how easy it is to learn
review_1_text: Divertida y muy funcional. Muy recomendable
review_2_text: Excellent version of this classic game. It is a pure joy and the graphics are excellent!
review_3_text: Exelente juego. buenas gráficas muy adictivo para pasar un buen rato altamente recomendable
